description: Amazon Simple Email Service (SES) API for sending emails, managing templates, and verifying sender identities.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a formatted email with subject and body to specified recipients via Amazon SES.

destination.description: Recipient email addresses organized by delivery type (To, Cc, Bcc).

message.description: Email content including subject line and body (text or HTML format).

source.description: The verified sender email address. Must be verified in Amazon SES.

reply_to_addresses.description: Email addresses that will receive replies when recipients respond to this email.

return_path.description: Email address where bounce and complaint notifications will be sent.

MessageId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the sent email message by Amazon SES.

RequestId.description: AWS request identifier for tracking and debugging purposes.

tools.name: send_raw_email
tools.description: Send a raw MIME-formatted email message, allowing full control over email headers and content structure.

raw_message.description: Base64-encoded MIME message containing complete email headers and body.

source.description: The verified sender email address. Must be verified in Amazon SES.

destinations.description: Recipient email addresses that override the To/Cc/Bcc headers in the MIME message.

MessageId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the sent email message by Amazon SES.

tools.name: send_templated_email
tools.description: Send an email using a pre-configured SES template with dynamic variable substitution.

destination.description: Recipient email addresses organized by delivery type (To, Cc, Bcc).

template.description: Name of the Amazon SES email template to use for this message.

template_data.description: JSON string containing key-value pairs for template variable substitution.

source.description: The verified sender email address. Must be verified in Amazon SES.

MessageId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the sent email message by Amazon SES.

tools.name: get_send_statistics
tools.description: Retrieve email sending statistics for the AWS account over the last 14 days, including delivery attempts, bounces, and complaints.

SendDataPoints.description: Time-series data points containing email sending metrics aggregated by time period.

Timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this data point was recorded.

DeliveryAttempts.description: Total number of email delivery attempts during this time period.

Bounces.description: Number of emails that bounced (hard or soft) during this time period.

Complaints.description: Number of spam complaints received during this time period.

Rejects.description: Number of emails rejected by Amazon SES during this time period.

tools.name: verify_email_identity
tools.description: Initiate the verification process for an email address to authorize it as a sender in Amazon SES.

email_address.description: The email address to verify as a sender identity in Amazon SES.

status.description: Current verification status: pending (verification email sent), success (verified), or failed (verification unsuccessful).

tools.name: get_identity_verification_attributes
tools.description: Retrieve the verification status and attributes for email addresses or domains registered as sender identities.

identities.description: List of email addresses or domain names to check verification status for.

VerificationAttributes.description: Map of identity names to their verification status and attributes.

VerificationStatus.description: Current verification status: Pending (awaiting verification), Success (verified and active), or Failed (verification unsuccessful).

VerificationToken.description: DKIM verification token for domain identities, used to configure DNS records.
